title: RE:RE:RE:RE: Subject Appening “RE:” After Every Reply
excerpt:
Description
Replies and reply-alls automatically prepend “RE,” which quickly becomes excessive and confusing. The current behavior makes long threads look messy and unprofessional. 
What are you trying to achieve
Please …

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Replies and reply-alls automatically prepend “RE,” which quickly becomes excessive and confusing. The current behavior makes long threads look messy and unprofessional.

What are you trying to achieve

Please update how email subjects are being generated. New emails allow us to create appropriate subject lines, which is a great feature and should be available for all emails/responses sent, regardless of the selection.

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: This is from a thread I am working on this Morning in Monday Service:

posts.author: tiffanye (Tiffany)
posts.cookedHtml:
REE518×149 11.2 KB

I am having this same issue. It makes replying back to clients less efficient and less professional. Please fix.

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: @Omer I think although this thread doesn’t have much exposure, the issues presented would alarm you! Is there any way you can help get this in the eyes of the proper personnel on your team?
